mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: neurological symptoms (restlessness, lethargy, drowsiness), hepatosplenomegaly (splenomegaly, jaundice)
corneal clouding (chemosis), short stature (barrel-shaped chest, long thorax), hearing impairment (difficulty walking), coarse facies
angioedema (allergy), renal involvement (proteinuria, anasarca), cardiac abnormalities (hypertension, syncope), peripheral neuropathy
joint hypermobility (tip-toe gait), skin fragility, easy bruising, intestinal complications (abdominal pain, weight loss)
chronic obstructive lung disease (chronic pulmonary obstruction, progressive pulmonary function impairment), liver dysfunction (jaundice, splenomegaly)
mental retardation, skeletal deformities (marfanoid body habitus, long limbs), vascular damage (stroke, transient ischemia attacks, peripheral arterial occlusive disease)
muscle weakness (proximal > distal), respiratory insufficiency, enlargement of organs due to accumulation of glycogen (heptatosplenomegaly, cardiomyopathy)
tall stature with disproportionately long arms and legs, pectus excavatum or barrel-shaped chest, scoliosis, ectopia lentis, mitral valve prolapse, aortic root dilatation
cafe au lait spots, neurofibromas, freckles around mouth and nose, iris hamartomas, bone lesions, learning difficulties
